hero.title: Peace of mind without surprises
hero.subtitle: We understand that your move is important. That's why we offer a safe, fixed-price household moving service - no hidden costs. With us, you can rest easy, both for your belongings and your wallet.
hero.description: We help you with everything from packing to cleaning. Fast, safe and reliable household moving service throughout Stockholm.

about.title: About Flyttella
about.description1: Flyttella is a moving and cleaning company based in Stockholm that was founded with the goal of making moving and cleaning services easier, safer and more transparent. We have been around for 5 years as a company, but have over 8 years of experience in the industry - something that is reflected in our way of working, our quality and our satisfied customers.
about.description2: To date, we have had the pleasure of helping over 8,000 customers, both private individuals and companies, with everything from small moves to complete solutions with cleaning, packing and advice. What makes us unique is our focus on clear terms and fixed prices - with us you always know what is included and what it costs.
about.description3: We offer free loan of moving boxes, free rebooking and cancellation up to 24 hours in advance, as well as a generous 14-day guarantee on all removals. Behind all this is our competent and personalised customer service, always available to answer questions, give advice and help you make the right decision.

features.title: Our benefits
features.fixedPriceDesc: No surprises - we offer both fixed prices and the option of variable prices
features.rutDeductionDesc: We handle all the paperwork for RUT deductions
features.freeBoxes: Free loan of cartons for 4 weeks
features.freeBoxesDesc: Customised moving boxes with our logo
features.reschedule: Rebook or cancel free of charge
features.rescheduleDesc: Reschedule or cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before the move
features.insuranceDesc: All necessary licences and insurance in place
features.trainedStaffDesc: Our staff are trained to ensure the highest quality and service.
features.managementDesc: We work with effective management systems to ensure structure and quality.
features.workplaceDesc: We prioritise a safe and secure working environment for both customers and staff.

reviews.title: What do our customers think of us?
reviews.subtitle: A safe and professional moving experience
reviews.description: As one of Sweden's most recommended moving companies, we put the customer in focus. We understand that moving can be stressful, so we strive to make the process as smooth and safe as possible. With our experience and dedicated team, we ensure that your move is a positive experience from start to finish.

form.movingService: Complete move out service with professional packing, transport and cleaning
form.cleaningService: Professional move out cleaning with guarantee

process.title: Our process
process.description: Our moving process is designed to be simple, transparent and safe. It starts with you filling in our form on the home page where you enter your details and moving needs. Within a minute, you will receive a quote sent to your provided email address. On the same day or the following day, we will contact you personally to discuss the details and answer any questions you may have. Once you are happy with the quote, you can easily sign it digitally. We will then carry out the move according to your wishes and agreement. The result? A satisfied customer who can focus on getting home to their new home.
process.fixedPrice: We work with fixed prices to give you peace of mind and transparency.
process.customQuote: Our quotes are always based on your specific needs and circumstances.
process.permits: As a reputable removal company, we have all the necessary permits, tax documents and insurance in place.

2.title: Personal contact
2.desc: We call the same day or the next day

aboutSection.title: Our experience
aboutSection.localExperienceDesc1: With over 8000 moves and 7000 cleanings behind us, we have built up a unique expertise in the moving and cleaning industry. Our experience spans the country and we've helped thousands of families and businesses with their moves.
aboutSection.localExperienceDesc2: Our achievements have earned us recognition as one of Sweden's most trusted removal companies, with over 1000 positive reviews and recommendations from satisfied customers. We are proud to offer professional moving services based on years of practical experience.

hero.title: Household moving
hero.subtitle: Let us take care of your entire move. With our professional household removals, you'll have a worry-free moving experience from start to finish.
hero.description: We carry out large and small household removals every day! It is our proud profession to safely and efficiently move things from one place to another at a competitive fixed price.

packing.title: Packing & Unpacking
packing.description: We pack your belongings safely and professionally using the right materials and techniques.

transport.title: Safe transport
transport.description: Modern removal vans and experienced movers ensure the safe transport of your belongings.

materials.title: Removals
materials.description: We provide all the removal materials needed for a safe move.

assembly.title: Dismantling & Assembly
assembly.description: We will help you dismantle and assemble furniture if necessary.

content.intro: Are you moving from one home to another? Let us at Flyttella take care of your move, we carry out large and small household removals every day! It is our proud profession to safely and efficiently move things from one place to another at a competitive fixed price.
content.expertise: We know that moving house can be difficult and stressful, but helping you move is our area of expertise.
content.quality: If you are looking for a quality removal service at reasonable prices then you have come to the right place! After many years in the business, we can promise you reliable service at a low price. After all, moving should be easy, and we make sure it is.
content.comprehensive: It doesn't matter if it's an apartment, a holiday home or a whole villa! We help you with the whole process! From disassembly, packing, packaging, transport, unpacking to furniture placement.
content.customized: Tell us what you need help with and we'll find a smart solution tailored to your needs.

process.title: Our process
process.description: Our moving process is designed to be simple, transparent and safe. It starts with you filling in our form on the home page where you enter your details and moving needs. Within a minute, you will receive a quote sent to your provided email address. On the same day or the following day, we will contact you personally to discuss the details and answer any questions you may have. Once you are happy with the quote, you can easily sign it digitally. We will then carry out the move according to your wishes and agreement. The result? A satisfied customer who can focus on getting home to their new home.
process.pricing: Our quotes are always based on your specific needs and circumstances. We take into account factors such as living space, floor, lift and parking distances to give you a quote that suits your situation, we can also inspect the property if necessary. All prices are fixed with no hidden fees - we always base our prices on your wishes and the information we receive from you as a customer. Do you have special requests or questions? Contact us and we will customise the quote to your needs.
process.subtitle: How it works

2.title: Personal contact
2.description: We call the same day or the next day

whatIs.title: What is a home mover?
whatIs.subtitle: A complete guide to home removals
whatIs.description: A household removal is a move of your entire household effects from one home to another. This includes everything from small possessions to large furniture and electronics. We take care of the whole process from start to finish.

0.title: What is involved in a home removal?
0.content: A complete household removal includes packing all your belongings, safe transport with modern removal vans, and unpacking at the new location. We handle everything from small items to large furniture with professional care.

1.title: For what types of housing?
1.content: We carry out removals for all types of property - apartments, villas, holiday homes and offices. Whatever the size or type of property, we can tailor our service to your specific needs.

2.title: Our professional approach
2.content: With over 8 years of experience in the industry, we know exactly what it takes for a smooth household move. We use the right materials, techniques and staff to ensure your belongings arrive safely and undamaged.

3.title: Benefits of our home removals service
3.content: We offer fixed prices, insurance for all belongings, and professional service from start to finish. You also get free loan of moving boxes and free rebooking up to 24 hours before the move.
